prompt_text:
### Demographics: 52-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 11 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 2 (60-89)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent)
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Major Depressive Disorder
Female Breast Cancer (Endocrine Therapy)
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Peptic ulcer disease (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 2 (60-89); HF (No); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 15 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~3.8 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Tamoxifen (20 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 54.6 kg; Height 168.2 cm; BMI 19.3 kg/m²; Blood pressure 127/77 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 10.3%; 9 months ago 9.5%; 6 months ago 9.0%; 3 months ago 8.5%; current 6.7%), FPG (12 months ago 296mg/dL; 9 months ago 269mg/dL; 6 months ago 236mg/dL; 3 months ago 235mg/dL; current 133mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 54.2kg; 9 months ago 53.8kg; 6 months ago 53.1kg; 3 months ago 47.9kg; current 54.6kg), Height (12 months ago 168.2cm; 9 months ago 168.2cm; 6 months ago 168.2cm; 3 months ago 168.2cm; current 168.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 17.0kg/m²; current 19.3kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 127mmHg; 9 months ago 133mmHg; 6 months ago 132mmHg; 3 months ago 128mmHg; current 127mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 77mmHg; 9 months ago 78mmHg; 6 months ago 79mmHg; 3 months ago 78mmHg; current 77mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 89U/L; 9 months ago 86U/L; 6 months ago 79U/L; 3 months ago 77U/L; current 87U/L), AST (12 months ago 61U/L; 9 months ago 60U/L; 6 months ago 53U/L; 3 months ago 60U/L; current 60U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.7mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 76mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 76mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 79mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 78mL/min/1.73m²; current 77mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 66mg/g; 9 months ago 69mg/g; 6 months ago 65mg/g; 3 months ago 71mg/g; current 79mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 85mg/dL; 9 months ago 82mg/dL; 6 months ago 86mg/dL; 3 months ago 81mg/dL; current 83mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 36mg/dL; 9 months ago 37mg/dL; 6 months ago 37mg/dL; 3 months ago 33mg/dL; current 35mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 97mg/dL; 9 months ago 110mg/dL; 6 months ago 114mg/dL; 3 months ago 92mg/dL; current 104mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.2g/dL; 9 months ago 13.3g/dL; 6 months ago 13.3g/dL; 3 months ago 13.3g/dL; current 12.5g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.73 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
